changes.rawTitle: Hooks/config: accept runtime channel plugin ids in `hooks.mappings[].channel` (for example `feishu`) instead of rejecting non-core channels during config validation. (#56226) Thanks @AiKrai001.

changes.title: Hooks/session routing: rebind hook-triggered `Agent:` session keys to the actual target Agent 之前 isolated dispatch so dedicated hook Agent keep their own session-scoped 工具 和 插件 identity. Thanks @kexinoh 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Hooks/session routing: rebind hook-triggered `agent:` session keys to the actual target agent before isolated dispatch so dedicated hook agents keep their own session-scoped tool and plugin identity. Thanks @kexinoh and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Host exec/env: block additional request-scoped env overrides that can redirect Docker endpoints, trust roots, compiler include paths, package resolution, 或 Python environment roots 期间 approved host runs. Thanks @tdjackey 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Host exec/env: block additional request-scoped env overrides that can redirect Docker endpoints, trust roots, compiler include paths, package resolution, or Python environment roots during approved host runs. Thanks @tdjackey and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Image generation/build: write stable runtime alias files 进入 `dist/` 和 route provider-认证 runtime lookups through those aliases so image-generation providers keep resolving 认证/runtime modules 之后 rebuilds 而不是 crashing 在 missing hashed chunk files.
changes.rawTitle: Image generation/build: write stable runtime alias files into `dist/` and route provider-auth runtime lookups through those aliases so image-generation providers keep resolving auth/runtime modules after rebuilds instead of crashing on missing hashed chunk files.

changes.title: iOS/Live Activities: mark the `ActivityKit` import 在 `LiveActivityManager.swift` as `@preconcurrency` so Xcode 26.4 / Swift 6 builds 停止 failing 在 strict concurrency checks. (#57180) Thanks @ngutman.
changes.rawTitle: iOS/Live Activities: mark the `ActivityKit` import in `LiveActivityManager.swift` as `@preconcurrency` so Xcode 26.4 / Swift 6 builds stop failing on strict concurrency checks. (#57180) Thanks @ngutman.

changes.title: LINE/ACP: 添加 current-conversation binding 和 inbound binding-routing parity so `/acp spawn ... --thread here`, configured ACP bindings, 和 active conversation-bound ACP sessions work 在 LINE like the other conversation channels.
changes.rawTitle: LINE/ACP: add current-conversation binding and inbound binding-routing parity so `/acp spawn ... --thread here`, configured ACP bindings, and active conversation-bound ACP sessions work on LINE like the other conversation channels.

changes.title: LINE/markdown: 保留 underscores inside Latin, Cyrillic, 和 CJK words 当 stripping markdown, while still removing standalone `_italic_` markers 在 the shared text-runtime 路径 used 通过 LINE 和 TTS. (#47465) Thanks @jackjin1997.
changes.rawTitle: LINE/markdown: preserve underscores inside Latin, Cyrillic, and CJK words when stripping markdown, while still removing standalone `_italic_` markers on the shared text-runtime path used by LINE and TTS. (#47465) Thanks @jackjin1997.

changes.title: LINE/status: 停止 `openclaw status` 从 warning about missing credentials 当 sanitized LINE snapshots are already configured, while still surfacing whether the missing field is the 令牌 或 secret. (#45701) Thanks @tamaosamu.
changes.rawTitle: LINE/status: stop `openclaw status` from warning about missing credentials when sanitized LINE snapshots are already configured, while still surfacing whether the missing field is the token or secret. (#45701) Thanks @tamaosamu.

changes.title: macOS/local 网关: 停止 OpenClaw.app 从 killing healthy local 网关 listeners 之后 startup 通过 recognizing the current `openclaw-网关` process title 和 using the current `openclaw 网关` launch shape.
changes.rawTitle: macOS/local gateway: stop OpenClaw.app from killing healthy local gateway listeners after startup by recognizing the current `openclaw-gateway` process title and using the current `openclaw gateway` launch shape.

changes.title: macOS/wide-area discovery: switch 网关 discovery to Tailscale MagicDNS names so Mac clients recover more reliably across changing tailnet IPs. (#57833) Thanks @jacobtomlinson.
changes.rawTitle: macOS/wide-area discovery: switch gateway discovery to Tailscale MagicDNS names so Mac clients recover more reliably across changing tailnet IPs. (#57833) Thanks @jacobtomlinson.

changes.title: Matrix/CLI send: start one-off Matrix send clients 之前 outbound delivery so `openclaw message send --channel matrix` restores E2EE 在 encrypted rooms 而不是 sending plain events. (#57936) Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Matrix/CLI send: start one-off Matrix send clients before outbound delivery so `openclaw message send --channel matrix` restores E2EE in encrypted rooms instead of sending plain events. (#57936) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: Matrix/context: filter fetched room context 通过 sender allowlists so reply 和 thread context lookup no longer pulls non-allowlisted messages 进入 Agent context. (#58376) Thanks @jacobtomlinson.
changes.rawTitle: Matrix/context: filter fetched room context by sender allowlists so reply and thread context lookup no longer pulls non-allowlisted messages into agent context. (#58376) Thanks @jacobtomlinson.

changes.title: Matrix/delivery recovery: treat Synapse `User not 在 room` replay failures as permanent 期间 startup recovery so poisoned queued messages move to `failed/` 而不是 崩溃-looping Matrix 之后 restart. (#57426) thanks @dlardo.
changes.rawTitle: Matrix/delivery recovery: treat Synapse `User not in room` replay failures as permanent during startup recovery so poisoned queued messages move to `failed/` instead of crash-looping Matrix after restart. (#57426) thanks @dlardo.

changes.title: Matrix/direct rooms: recover fresh auto-joined 1:1 DMs 不适用 eagerly persisting invite-only `m.direct` mappings, while keeping named, aliased, 和 explicitly configured rooms 在 the room 路径. (#58024) Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Matrix/direct rooms: recover fresh auto-joined 1:1 DMs without eagerly persisting invite-only `m.direct` mappings, while keeping named, aliased, and explicitly configured rooms on the room path. (#58024) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: Matrix/direct rooms: 停止 trusting remote `is_direct`, honor explicit local `is_direct: false` 为了 discovered DM candidates, 和 避免 extra member-state lookups 为了 shared rooms so DM routing 和 repair stay aligned. (#57124) Thanks @w-sss.
changes.rawTitle: Matrix/direct rooms: stop trusting remote `is_direct`, honor explicit local `is_direct: false` for discovered DM candidates, and avoid extra member-state lookups for shared rooms so DM routing and repair stay aligned. (#57124) Thanks @w-sss.

changes.title: Matrix/DM threads: keep strict unnamed fresh-invite rooms promotable even 当 Matrix omits the optional direct hint, 保留 repair-failed local DM promotions while still revalidating later room metadata, 和 keep both bound 和 thread-isolated Matrix sessions reporting the correct route policy. (#58099) Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Matrix/DM threads: keep strict unnamed fresh-invite rooms promotable even when Matrix omits the optional direct hint, preserve repair-failed local DM promotions while still revalidating later room metadata, and keep both bound and thread-isolated Matrix sessions reporting the correct route policy. (#58099) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: Matrix/插件 loading: ship 和 source-load the crypto bootstrap runtime sidecar 正确地 so current `main` stops warning about failed Matrix bootstrap loads 和 `matrix/index` 插件-id mismatches 在 every invocation. (#53298) thanks @keithce.
changes.rawTitle: Matrix/plugin loading: ship and source-load the crypto bootstrap runtime sidecar correctly so current `main` stops warning about failed Matrix bootstrap loads and `matrix/index` plugin-id mismatches on every invocation. (#53298) thanks @keithce.

changes.title: Mattermost/websocket: detect stale Mattermost WebSocket sessions 之后 bot 禁用/启用 cycles so monitoring reconnects cleanly 而不是 静默地 staying stale. (#53604) Thanks @Qinsam.
changes.rawTitle: Mattermost/websocket: detect stale Mattermost WebSocket sessions after bot disable/enable cycles so monitoring reconnects cleanly instead of silently staying stale. (#53604) Thanks @Qinsam.

changes.title: Media/downloads: 停止 forwarding 认证 和 cookie headers across cross-origin redirects 期间 media saves, while preserving safe request headers 为了 same-origin redirect chains. Thanks @AntAISecurityLab 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Media/downloads: stop forwarding auth and cookie headers across cross-origin redirects during media saves, while preserving safe request headers for same-origin redirect chains. Thanks @AntAISecurityLab and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Media/images: reject oversized decoded image inputs 之前 metadata 和 resize backends run, so tiny compressed image bombs fail early 而不是 exhausting 网关 内存. (#58226) Thanks @AntAISecurityLab 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Media/images: reject oversized decoded image inputs before metadata and resize backends run, so tiny compressed image bombs fail early instead of exhausting gateway memory. (#58226) Thanks @AntAISecurityLab and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 内存/诊断工具: probe QMD availability 从 the Agent workspace too, so `openclaw 诊断工具` no longer falsely reports relative `内存.qmd.命令` configs as broken while runtime search still works. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/doctor: probe QMD availability from the agent workspace too, so `openclaw doctor` no longer falsely reports relative `memory.qmd.command` configs as broken while runtime search still works. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 内存/诊断工具: suppress the orphan transcript cleanup warning 当 QMD session indexing is enabled, so 诊断工具 no longer suggests deleting transcript history that QMD still uses 为了 recall. (#40584) Thanks @Gyarados4157 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/doctor: suppress the orphan transcript cleanup warning when QMD session indexing is enabled, so doctor no longer suggests deleting transcript history that QMD still uses for recall. (#40584) Thanks @Gyarados4157 and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 内存/FTS: 添加 configurable trigram tokenization plus short-CJK substring fallback so 内存 search can find Chinese, Japanese, 和 Korean text 不适用 破坏性变更 mixed long-和-short queries. Thanks @carrotRakko.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/FTS: add configurable trigram tokenization plus short-CJK substring fallback so memory search can find Chinese, Japanese, and Korean text without breaking mixed long-and-short queries. Thanks @carrotRakko.

changes.title: 内存/FTS: keep provider-less keyword hits visible at the default 内存-search threshold, so FTS-only recall works 不适用 requiring `--min-score 0`. (#56473) Thanks @opriz.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/FTS: keep provider-less keyword hits visible at the default memory-search threshold, so FTS-only recall works without requiring `--min-score 0`. (#56473) Thanks @opriz.

changes.title: 内存/LanceDB: 解决 runtime dependency manifest lookup 从 the bundled `extensions/内存-lancedb` 路径 (including flattened dist chunks) so startup no longer fails 使用 a missing `@lancedb/lancedb` dependency 错误. (#56623) Thanks @LUKSOAgent.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/LanceDB: resolve runtime dependency manifest lookup from the bundled `extensions/memory-lancedb` path (including flattened dist chunks) so startup no longer fails with a missing `@lancedb/lancedb` dependency error. (#56623) Thanks @LUKSOAgent.

changes.title: 内存/QMD: 添加 `内存.qmd.searchTool` as an exact mcporter 工具 override, so custom QMD MCP协议 tools such as `hybrid_search` can be used 不适用 weakening the validated `searchMode` 配置 surface. (#27801) Thanks @keramblock.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: add `memory.qmd.searchTool` as an exact mcporter tool override, so custom QMD MCP tools such as `hybrid_search` can be used without weakening the validated `searchMode` config surface. (#27801) Thanks @keramblock.

changes.title: 内存/QMD: honor `内存.qmd.更新.embedInterval` even 当 regular QMD 更新 cadence is disabled 或 slower 通过 arming a dedicated embed-cadence maintenance timer, while avoiding redundant timers 当 regular updates are already frequent enough. (#37326) Thanks @barronlroth.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: honor `memory.qmd.update.embedInterval` even when regular QMD update cadence is disabled or slower by arming a dedicated embed-cadence maintenance timer, while avoiding redundant timers when regular updates are already frequent enough. (#37326) Thanks @barronlroth.

changes.title: 内存/QMD: include deduplicated default plus per-Agent `memorySearch.extraPaths` 当 building QMD custom collections, so shared 和 Agent-specific extra roots both get indexed consistently. (#57315) Thanks @Vitalcheffe 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: include deduplicated default plus per-agent `memorySearch.extraPaths` when building QMD custom collections, so shared and agent-specific extra roots both get indexed consistently. (#57315) Thanks @Vitalcheffe and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 内存/QMD: keep `memory_search` session-hit paths roundtrip-safe 当 exported session markdown lives under the workspace `qmd/` directory, so `memory_get` can read the exact returned 路径 而不是 failing 在 the generic `qmd/sessions/...` alias. (#43519) Thanks @holgergruenhagen 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: keep `memory_search` session-hit paths roundtrip-safe when exported session markdown lives under the workspace `qmd/` directory, so `memory_get` can read the exact returned path instead of failing on the generic `qmd/sessions/...` alias. (#43519) Thanks @holgergruenhagen and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 内存/QMD: keep `qmd embed` active 在 `search` mode too, so BM25-first setups still build a complete index 为了 later vector 和 hybrid retrieval. (#54509) Thanks @hnshah 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: keep `qmd embed` active in `search` mode too, so BM25-first setups still build a complete index for later vector and hybrid retrieval. (#54509) Thanks @hnshah and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 内存/QMD: keep reset 和 deleted session transcripts 在 QMD session export so daily session resets do not 静默地 drop most historical recall 从 `memory_search`. (#30220) Thanks @pushkarsingh32.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: keep reset and deleted session transcripts in QMD session export so daily session resets do not silently drop most historical recall from `memory_search`. (#30220) Thanks @pushkarsingh32.

changes.title: 内存/QMD: pass a direct-session 密钥 在 `openclaw 内存 search` so CLI QMD searches no longer get denied as `session=<none>` under direct-only scope defaults. (#43517) Thanks @waynecc-at 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: pass a direct-session key on `openclaw memory search` so CLI QMD searches no longer get denied as `session=<none>` under direct-only scope defaults. (#43517) Thanks @waynecc-at and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 内存/QMD: point `QMD_CONFIG_DIR` at the nested `xdg-配置/qmd` directory so per-Agent collection 配置 resolves 正确地. (#39078) Thanks @smart-tinker 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: point `QMD_CONFIG_DIR` at the nested `xdg-config/qmd` directory so per-agent collection config resolves correctly. (#39078) Thanks @smart-tinker and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 内存/QMD: 保留 explicit `start_line` 和 `end_line` metadata 从 mcporter query results so `内存 search` hits keep the real snippet offsets 而不是 falling back to the snippet header. (#47960) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: preserve explicit `start_line` and `end_line` metadata from mcporter query results so `memory search` hits keep the real snippet offsets instead of falling back to the snippet header. (#47960) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 内存/QMD: rebind collections 当 QMD reports a changed pattern 但是 omits 路径 metadata, so 配置 pattern changes 停止 being 静默地 ignored 在 restart. (#49897) Thanks @Madruru.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: rebind collections when QMD reports a changed pattern but omits path metadata, so config pattern changes stop being silently ignored on restart. (#49897) Thanks @Madruru.

changes.title: 内存/QMD: 解决 slugified `memory_search` file hints back to the indexed filesystem 路径 之前 returning search hits, so `memory_get` works 重新 为了 mixed-case 和 spaced paths. (#50313) Thanks @erra9x.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: resolve slugified `memory_search` file hints back to the indexed filesystem path before returning search hits, so `memory_get` works again for mixed-case and spaced paths. (#50313) Thanks @erra9x.

changes.title: 内存/QMD: send MCP协议 `query` collection filters as the upstream `collections` array 而不是 the legacy singular `collection` field, so mcporter-backed QMD 1.1+ searches still scope 正确地 之后 the unified `query` 工具 migration. (#54728) Thanks @armanddp 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: send MCP `query` collection filters as the upstream `collections` array instead of the legacy singular `collection` field, so mcporter-backed QMD 1.1+ searches still scope correctly after the unified `query` tool migration. (#54728) Thanks @armanddp and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 内存/QMD: serialize cross-process `qmd embed` runs behind a shared lock 和 stagger periodic embed timers so multi-Agent QMD collections 停止 thundering-herding 在 startup 和 every maintenance interval. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: serialize cross-process `qmd embed` runs behind a shared lock and stagger periodic embed timers so multi-agent QMD collections stop thundering-herding on startup and every maintenance interval. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 内存/QMD: 停止 rewriting Han/CJK BM25 queries 之前 `qmd search`, so OpenClaw search semantics match direct QMD results 为了 mixed 和 spaced Chinese queries. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: stop rewriting Han/CJK BM25 queries before `qmd search`, so OpenClaw search semantics match direct QMD results for mixed and spaced Chinese queries. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 内存/QMD: surface degraded vector status 从 `qmd status` so `openclaw 内存 status --deep` warns 当 semantic search is unavailable because the index still has `0` vectors. 修复 #28169. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: surface degraded vector status from `qmd status` so `openclaw memory status --deep` warns when semantic search is unavailable because the index still has `0` vectors. Fixes #28169. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 内存/QMD: treat null-byte collection corruption the same 当 QMD surfaces it as `ENOENT`, so managed-collection repair still rebuilds 和 retries 而不是 leaving QMD stuck 在 a broken 路径. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: treat null-byte collection corruption the same when QMD surfaces it as `ENOENT`, so managed-collection repair still rebuilds and retries instead of leaving QMD stuck on a broken path. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 内存/QMD: warn explicitly 当 `内存.backend=qmd` is configured 但是 the `qmd` binary is missing, so 诊断工具 和 runtime fallback no longer fail as a silent builtin downgrade. (#50439) Thanks @Jimmy-xuzimo 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: warn explicitly when `memory.backend=qmd` is configured but the `qmd` binary is missing, so doctor and runtime fallback no longer fail as a silent builtin downgrade. (#50439) Thanks @Jimmy-xuzimo and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 内存/QMD: weight CJK-heavy text 正确地 当 estimating chunk sizes, 保留 surrogate-pair characters 期间 fine splits, 和 keep long Latin lines 在 the old chunk boundaries so 内存 indexing produces better-sized chunks 为了 CJK notes. (#40271) Thanks @AaronLuo00.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: weight CJK-heavy text correctly when estimating chunk sizes, preserve surrogate-pair characters during fine splits, and keep long Latin lines on the old chunk boundaries so memory indexing produces better-sized chunks for CJK notes. (#40271) Thanks @AaronLuo00.

changes.title: 内存/session indexer: include `.jsonl.reset.*` 和 `.jsonl.deleted.*` transcripts 在 the 内存 host session scan while still excluding `.jsonl.bak.*` compaction backups 和 lock files, so 内存 search sees archived session history 不适用 duplicating stale snapshots. Thanks @hclsys 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/session indexer: include `.jsonl.reset.*` and `.jsonl.deleted.*` transcripts in the memory host session scan while still excluding `.jsonl.bak.*` compaction backups and lock files, so memory search sees archived session history without duplicating stale snapshots. Thanks @hclsys and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Microsoft Teams/threads: filter fetched thread history 通过 sender allowlists so thread context seeding no longer pulls messages 从 disallowed users. (#57723) Thanks @jacobtomlinson.
changes.rawTitle: Microsoft Teams/threads: filter fetched thread history by sender allowlists so thread context seeding no longer pulls messages from disallowed users. (#57723) Thanks @jacobtomlinson.

changes.title: OpenAI/Codex fast mode: map `/fast` to priority processing 在 native OpenAI 和 Codex Responses endpoints 而不是 rewriting reasoning settings, 和 document the exact endpoint 和 override behavior.
changes.rawTitle: OpenAI/Codex fast mode: map `/fast` to priority processing on native OpenAI and Codex Responses endpoints instead of rewriting reasoning settings, and document the exact endpoint and override behavior.

changes.title: Outbound media/local files: piggyback host-local `MEDIA:` reads 在 the configured fs policy 而不是 a separate media-root check, so generated files outside the workspace can send 当 `tools.fs.workspaceOnly=false` while plaintext-like host files stay blocked 通过 the outbound media allowlist.
changes.rawTitle: Outbound media/local files: piggyback host-local `MEDIA:` reads on the configured fs policy instead of a separate media-root check, so generated files outside the workspace can send when `tools.fs.workspaceOnly=false` while plaintext-like host files stay blocked by the outbound media allowlist.

changes.title: Pairing: enforce pending request limits per account 而不是 per shared channel queue, so one account's outstanding pairing challenges no longer block new pairing 在 other accounts. Thanks @smaeljaish771 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Pairing: enforce pending request limits per account instead of per shared channel queue, so one account's outstanding pairing challenges no longer block new pairing on other accounts. Thanks @smaeljaish771 and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/ClawHub: sanitize temporary archive filenames 为了 scoped package names 和 slash-containing skill slugs so `openclaw 插件 install @scope/name` no longer fails 使用 `ENOENT` 期间 archive download. (#56452) Thanks @soimy.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/ClawHub: sanitize temporary archive filenames for scoped package names and slash-containing skill slugs so `openclaw plugins install @scope/name` no longer fails with `ENOENT` during archive download. (#56452) Thanks @soimy.

changes.title: 插件/CLI: 添加 descriptor-backed lazy 插件 CLI registration so Matrix can keep its CLI module lazy-loaded 不适用 dropping `openclaw matrix ...` 从 parse-time 命令 registration. (#57165) Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/CLI: add descriptor-backed lazy plugin CLI registration so Matrix can keep its CLI module lazy-loaded without dropping `openclaw matrix ...` from parse-time command registration. (#57165) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: 插件/CLI: collect root-help 插件 descriptors through a dedicated non-activating CLI metadata 路径 so enabled 插件 keep validated 配置 semantics 不适用 triggering runtime-only 插件 registration work, while preserving runtime CLI 命令 registration 为了 legacy channel 插件 that still wire commands 从 full registration. (#57294) thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/CLI: collect root-help plugin descriptors through a dedicated non-activating CLI metadata path so enabled plugins keep validated config semantics without triggering runtime-only plugin registration work, while preserving runtime CLI command registration for legacy channel plugins that still wire commands from full registration. (#57294) thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: 插件/facades: guard bundled 插件 facade loads 使用 a cache-first sentinel so circular re-entry stops crashing `xai`, `sglang`, 和 `vllm` 期间 网关 插件 startup. (#57508) Thanks @openperf.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/facades: guard bundled plugin facade loads with a cache-first sentinel so circular re-entry stops crashing `xai`, `sglang`, and `vllm` during gateway plugin startup. (#57508) Thanks @openperf.

changes.title: 插件/Matrix: mirror the Matrix crypto WASM runtime dependency 进入 the root packaged install 和 enforce root/插件 dependency parity so bundled Matrix E2EE crypto resolves 正确地 在 shipped builds. (#57163) Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/Matrix: mirror the Matrix crypto WASM runtime dependency into the root packaged install and enforce root/plugin dependency parity so bundled Matrix E2EE crypto resolves correctly in shipped builds. (#57163) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: 插件/startup: block workspace `.env` 从 overriding `OPENCLAW_BUNDLED_PLUGINS_DIR`, so bundled 插件 trust roots only come 从 inherited runtime env 或 package resolution 而不是 repo-local dotenv files. Thanks @nexrin 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/startup: block workspace `.env` from overriding `OPENCLAW_BUNDLED_PLUGINS_DIR`, so bundled plugin trust roots only come from inherited runtime env or package resolution instead of repo-local dotenv files. Thanks @nexrin and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Sandbox/浏览器: install `fonts-noto-cjk` 在 the sandbox 浏览器 image so screenshots render Chinese, Japanese, 和 Korean text 正确地 而不是 tofu boxes. 修复 #35597. Thanks @carrotRakko 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Sandbox/browser: install `fonts-noto-cjk` in the sandbox browser image so screenshots render Chinese, Japanese, and Korean text correctly instead of tofu boxes. Fixes #35597. Thanks @carrotRakko and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 安全/LINE: make Webhook signature validation run the timing-safe compare even 当 the supplied signature length is wrong, closing a small timing side-channel. (#55663) Thanks @gavyngong.
changes.rawTitle: Security/LINE: make webhook signature validation run the timing-safe compare even when the supplied signature length is wrong, closing a small timing side-channel. (#55663) Thanks @gavyngong.

changes.title: Sessions/飞书: 保留 conversation ids that legitimately embed `:topic:` 在 shared session helper parsing, while keeping Telegram topic session parsing intact. (#58100) Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Sessions/Feishu: preserve conversation ids that legitimately embed `:topic:` in shared session helper parsing, while keeping Telegram topic session parsing intact. (#58100) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: Slack/status reactions: 添加 a reaction lifecycle 为了 queued, thinking, 工具, done, 和 错误 phases 在 Slack monitors, 使用 safer cleanup so queued ack reactions stay correct across silent runs, pre-reply failures, 和 delayed transitions. (#56430) Thanks @hsiaoa.
changes.rawTitle: Slack/status reactions: add a reaction lifecycle for queued, thinking, tool, done, and error phases in Slack monitors, with safer cleanup so queued ack reactions stay correct across silent runs, pre-reply failures, and delayed transitions. (#56430) Thanks @hsiaoa.

changes.title: Status/node-only hosts: teach `openclaw status` to 处理 node-only hosts 在 current `main` 不适用 the old mixed 网关 assumptions. (#56718) Thanks @ImLukeF.
changes.rawTitle: Status/node-only hosts: teach `openclaw status` to handle node-only hosts on current `main` without the old mixed gateway assumptions. (#56718) Thanks @ImLukeF.

changes.title: Status: 修复 cache hit rate exceeding 100% 通过 deriving denominator 从 prompt-side 令牌 fields 而不是 potentially undersized totalTokens. 修复 #26643.
changes.rawTitle: Status: fix cache hit rate exceeding 100% by deriving denominator from prompt-side token fields instead of potentially undersized totalTokens. Fixes #26643.

changes.title: Telegram/audio: transcode Telegram 语音-note `.ogg` attachments 之前 the local `whisper-CLI` auto fallback runs, 和 keep mention-preflight transcription enabled 在 auto mode 当 `tools.media.audio` is unset.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/audio: transcode Telegram voice-note `.ogg` attachments before the local `whisper-cli` auto fallback runs, and keep mention-preflight transcription enabled in auto mode when `tools.media.audio` is unset.

changes.title: Telegram/forum topics: restore reply routing to the active topic 和 keep ACP `sessions_spawn(..., thread=true, mode="session")` bound to that same topic 而不是 falling back to root chat 或 losing follow-up routing. (#56060) Thanks @one27001.

changes.title: Telegram/media: 允许 RFC 2544 benchmark-range Telegram CDN resolutions 期间 media downloads, so 语音 messages, PDFs, 和 other attachments no longer fail 使用 `Failed to download media`. (#57624) Thanks @MoerAI.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/media: allow RFC 2544 benchmark-range Telegram CDN resolutions during media downloads, so voice messages, PDFs, and other attachments no longer fail with `Failed to download media`. (#57624) Thanks @MoerAI.

changes.title: Telegram/native commands: prefix native 命令 menu callback payloads 和 保留 `CommandSource: "native"` 当 Telegram replays them through callback queries, so `/fast` 和 other native 命令 menus keep working even 当 text-命令 routing is disabled. Thanks @vincentkoc.

Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Telegram/polling: keep the watchdog 从 aborting long-running reply delivery 通过 treating recent non-polling API activity as bounded liveness 而不是 a hard stall. (#56343) Thanks @openperf.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/polling: keep the watchdog from aborting long-running reply delivery by treating recent non-polling API activity as bounded liveness instead of a hard stall. (#56343) Thanks @openperf.

changes.title: Tools/web_fetch: 添加 an explicit trusted env-代理 路径 为了 代理-only installs while keeping strict SSRF fetches 在 the pinned direct 路径, so trusted 代理 routing does not weaken strict destination binding. (#50650) Thanks @kkav004.

changes.rawTitle: Tools/web_search: localize the shared search cache to module scope so same-process global symbol lookups can no longer inspect or mutate cached web-search responses. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: TUI/chat: keep optimistic outbound user messages visible 期间 active runs 通过 deferring local-run binding until the first 网关 chat event reveals the real run id, preventing premature history reloads 从 wiping pending local sends. (#54722) Thanks @seanturner001.

items.rawTitle: LINE/outbound media: add LINE image, video, and audio outbound sends on the LINE-specific delivery path, including explicit preview/tracking handling for videos while keeping generic media sends on the existing image-only route. (#45826) Thanks @masatohoshino.

items.rawTitle: ACP/security: replace ACP's dangerous-tool name override with semantic approval classes, so only narrow readonly reads/searches can auto-approve while indirect exec-capable and control-plane tools always require explicit prompt approval. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.rawTitle: ACP/sessions_spawn: register ACP child runs for completion tracking and lifecycle cleanup, and make registration-failure cleanup explicitly best-effort so callers do not assume an already-started ACP turn was fully aborted. (#40885) Thanks @xaeon2026 and @vincentkoc.

items.title: 内存/QMD: honor `内存.qmd.更新.embedInterval` even 当 regular QMD 更新 cadence is disabled 或 slower 通过 arming a dedicated embed-cadence maintenance timer, while avoiding redundant timers 当 regular updates are already frequent enough. (#37326) Thanks @barronlroth.

items.title: 内存/QMD: keep `qmd embed` active 在 `search` mode too, so BM25-first setups still build a complete index 为了 later vector 和 hybrid retrieval. (#54509) Thanks @hnshah 和 @vincentkoc.

items.title: 内存/QMD: pass a direct-session 密钥 在 `openclaw 内存 search` so CLI QMD searches no longer get denied as `session=<none>` under direct-only scope defaults. (#43517) Thanks @waynecc-at 和 @vincentkoc.

items.title: 内存/QMD: 解决 slugified `memory_search` file hints back to the indexed filesystem 路径 之前 returning search hits, so `memory_get` works 重新 为了 mixed-case 和 spaced paths. (#50313) Thanks @erra9x.
items.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: resolve slugified `memory_search` file hints back to the indexed filesystem path before returning search hits, so `memory_get` works again for mixed-case and spaced paths. (#50313) Thanks @erra9x.

items.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: stop rewriting Han/CJK BM25 queries before `qmd search`, so OpenClaw search semantics match direct QMD results for mixed and spaced Chinese queries. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: 内存/QMD: surface degraded vector status 从 `qmd status` so `openclaw 内存 status --deep` warns 当 semantic search is unavailable because the index still has `0` vectors. 修复 #28169. Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: surface degraded vector status from `qmd status` so `openclaw memory status --deep` warns when semantic search is unavailable because the index still has `0` vectors. Fixes #28169. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: 内存/QMD: treat null-byte collection corruption the same 当 QMD surfaces it as `ENOENT`, so managed-collection repair still rebuilds 和 retries 而不是 leaving QMD stuck 在 a broken 路径. Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: treat null-byte collection corruption the same when QMD surfaces it as `ENOENT`, so managed-collection repair still rebuilds and retries instead of leaving QMD stuck on a broken path. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: 内存/QMD: weight CJK-heavy text 正确地 当 estimating chunk sizes, 保留 surrogate-pair characters 期间 fine splits, 和 keep long Latin lines 在 the old chunk boundaries so 内存 indexing produces better-sized chunks 为了 CJK notes. (#40271) Thanks @AaronLuo00.
items.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: weight CJK-heavy text correctly when estimating chunk sizes, preserve surrogate-pair characters during fine splits, and keep long Latin lines on the old chunk boundaries so memory indexing produces better-sized chunks for CJK notes. (#40271) Thanks @AaronLuo00.

items.title: 内存/session indexer: include `.jsonl.reset.*` 和 `.jsonl.deleted.*` transcripts 在 the 内存 host session scan while still excluding `.jsonl.bak.*` compaction backups 和 lock files, so 内存 search sees archived session history 不适用 duplicating stale snapshots. Thanks @hclsys 和 @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Memory/session indexer: include `.jsonl.reset.*` and `.jsonl.deleted.*` transcripts in the memory host session scan while still excluding `.jsonl.bak.*` compaction backups and lock files, so memory search sees archived session history without duplicating stale snapshots. Thanks @hclsys and @vincentkoc.

items.rawTitle: Memory/builtin: keep memory-file indexing active in FTS-only mode (no embedding provider) so forced reindexes no longer swap in an empty index and wipe existing memory chunks. (#42714) Thanks @asamimei.

changes.rawTitle: Agents/status: use provider-aware context window lookup for fresh Anthropic 4.6 model overrides so `/status` shows the correct 1.0m window instead of an underreported shared-cache minimum. (#54796) Thanks @neeravmakwana.

changes.rawTitle: OpenAI/WebSocket: preserve reasoning replay metadata and tool-call item ids on WebSocket tool turns, and start a fresh response chain when full-context resend is required. (#53856) Thanks @xujingchen1996.

changes.title: OpenAI/WS: restore reasoning blocks 为了 Responses WebSocket runs 和 keep reasoning/工具-call replay metadata intact so resumed sessions do not lose 或 break follow-up reasoning-capable turns. (#53856) Thanks @xujingchen1996.
changes.rawTitle: OpenAI/WS: restore reasoning blocks for Responses WebSocket runs and keep reasoning/tool-call replay metadata intact so resumed sessions do not lose or break follow-up reasoning-capable turns. (#53856) Thanks @xujingchen1996.

changes.title: Agent/errors: surface provider quota/reset details 当 available, 但是 keep HTML/Cloudflare rate-limit pages 在 the generic fallback so raw 错误 pages are not shown to users. (#54512) Thanks @bugkill3r.

changes.title: Claude CLI/MCP协议: always pass a strict generated `--MCP协议-配置` overlay 为了 background Claude CLI runs, including the empty-server case, so Claude does not inherit ambient user/global MCP协议 servers. (#54961) Thanks @markojak.

changes.rawTitle: Agents/embedded replies: surface mid-turn 429 and overload failures when embedded runs end without a user-visible reply, while preserving successful media-only replies that still use legacy `mediaUrl`. (#50930) Thanks @infichen.

changes.title: WhatsApp/allowFrom: show a specific allowFrom policy 错误 为了 valid blocked targets 而不是 the misleading `<E.164|group JID>` format hint. Thanks @mcaxtr.
changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp/allowFrom: show a specific allowFrom policy error for valid blocked targets instead of the misleading `<E.164|group JID>` format hint. Thanks @mcaxtr.

changes.title: Agent/cooldowns: scope rate-limit cooldowns per 模型 so one 429 no longer blocks every 模型 在 the same 认证 profile, replace the exponential 1 min -> 1 h escalation 使用 a stepped 30 s / 1 min / 5 min ladder, 和 surface a user-facing countdown message 当 all 模型 are rate-limited. (#49834) Thanks @kiranvk-2011.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/cooldowns: scope rate-limit cooldowns per model so one 429 no longer blocks every model on the same auth profile, replace the exponential 1 min -> 1 h escalation with a stepped 30 s / 1 min / 5 min ladder, and surface a user-facing countdown message when all models are rate-limited. (#49834) Thanks @kiranvk-2011.

changes.title: Agent/embedded transport errors: distinguish common network failures like connection refused, DNS lookup failure, 和 interrupted sockets 从 true timeouts 在 embedded-run user messaging 和 lifecycle diagnostics. (#51419) Thanks @scoootscooob.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/embedded transport errors: distinguish common network failures like connection refused, DNS lookup failure, and interrupted sockets from true timeouts in embedded-run user messaging and lifecycle diagnostics. (#51419) Thanks @scoootscooob.

changes.rawTitle: Mattermost/replies: keep pairing replies, slash-command fallback replies, and model-picker messages on the resolved config path so `exec:` SecretRef bot tokens work across all outbound reply branches. (#48347) thanks @mathiasnagler.

changes.rawTitle: MCP/channels: add a Gateway-backed channel MCP bridge with Codex/Claude-facing conversation tools, Claude channel notifications, and safer stdio bridge lifecycle handling for reconnects and routed session discovery.

(#54283) Thanks @xieyongliang.

changes.title: 配置/web fetch: 允许 the documented `tools.web.fetch.maxResponseBytes` 设置 在 runtime schema validation so valid configs no longer fail 使用 unrecognized-密钥 errors. (#53401) Thanks @erhhung.
changes.rawTitle: Config/web fetch: allow the documented `tools.web.fetch.maxResponseBytes` setting in runtime schema validation so valid configs no longer fail with unrecognized-key errors. (#53401) Thanks @erhhung.

changes.title: Message 工具/buttons: keep the shared `buttons` schema optional 在 merged 工具 definitions so plain `action=send` calls 停止 failing validation 当 no buttons are provided. (#54418) Thanks @adzendo.
changes.rawTitle: Message tool/buttons: keep the shared `buttons` schema optional in merged tool definitions so plain `action=send` calls stop failing validation when no buttons are provided. (#54418) Thanks @adzendo.

changes.title: Agent/OpenAI-compatible 工具 calls: deduplicate repeated 工具 call ids across live assistant messages 和 replayed history so OpenAI-compatible backends no longer reject duplicate `tool_call_id` values 使用 HTTP 400. (#40996) Thanks @xaeon2026.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/openai-compatible tool calls: deduplicate repeated tool call ids across live assistant messages and replayed history so OpenAI-compatible backends no longer reject duplicate `tool_call_id` values with HTTP 400. (#40996) Thanks @xaeon2026.

changes.title: 模型/OpenAI-completions: default non-native OpenAI-compatible providers to omit 工具-definition `strict` fields unless users explicitly opt back 在, so 工具 calling keeps working 在 providers that reject that 选项. (#45497) Thanks @sahancava.
changes.rawTitle: Models/openai-completions: default non-native OpenAI-compatible providers to omit tool-definition `strict` fields unless users explicitly opt back in, so tool calling keeps working on providers that reject that option. (#45497) Thanks @sahancava.

changes.rawTitle: Daemon/Linux: stop flagging non-gateway systemd services as duplicate gateways just because their unit files mention OpenClaw, reducing false-positive doctor/log noise. (#45328) Thanks @gregretkowski.

changes.rawTitle: Feishu: close WebSocket connections on monitor stop/abort so ghost connections no longer persist, preventing duplicate event processing and resource leaks across restart cycles. (#52844) Thanks @schumilin.

changes.rawTitle: Feishu: use the original message `create_time` instead of `Date.now()` for inbound timestamps so offline-retried messages carry the correct authoring time, preventing mis-targeted agent actions on stale instructions. (#52809) Thanks @schumilin.

changes.rawTitle: Matrix/replies: include quoted poll question/options in inbound reply context so the agent sees the original poll content when users reply to Matrix poll messages. (#55056) Thanks @alberthild.

changes.rawTitle: Agents/sandbox: make blocked-tool guidance glob-aware again, redact/sanitize session-specific explain hints for safer copy-paste, and avoid leaking control-character session keys in those hints. (#54684) Thanks @ngutman.

changes.rawTitle: Agents/compaction: trigger timeout recovery compaction before retrying high-context LLM timeouts so embedded runs stop repeating oversized requests. (#46417) thanks @joeykrug.

changes.rawTitle: Agents/compaction: reconcile `sessions.json.compactionCount` after a late embedded auto-compaction success so persisted session counts catch up once the handler reports completion. (#45493) Thanks @jackal092927.

changes.title: 插件/runtime: 复用 only compatible active 插件 registries across tools, providers, web search, 和 channel bootstrap, align `/tools/invoke` 插件 loading 使用 the session workspace, 和 重试 outbound channel recovery 当 the pinned channel surface changes so 插件 tools 和 channels 停止 disappearing 或 re-registering 从 mismatched runtime loads. Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/runtime: reuse only compatible active plugin registries across tools, providers, web search, and channel bootstrap, align `/tools/invoke` plugin loading with the session workspace, and retry outbound channel recovery when the pinned channel surface changes so plugin tools and channels stop disappearing or re-registering from mismatched runtime loads. Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: Talk/macOS: 停止 direct system-语音 failures 从 replaying system speech, use app-locale fallback 为了 shared watchdog timing, 和 添加 regression coverage 为了 the macOS fallback route 和 language-aware 超时 policy. (#53511) thanks @hongsw.
changes.rawTitle: Talk/macOS: stop direct system-voice failures from replaying system speech, use app-locale fallback for shared watchdog timing, and add regression coverage for the macOS fallback route and language-aware timeout policy. (#53511) thanks @hongsw.

changes.rawTitle: Discord/gateway cleanup: keep late Carbon reconnect-exhausted errors suppressed through startup/dispose cleanup so Discord monitor shutdown no longer crashes on late gateway close events. (#55373) Thanks @Takhoffman.

changes.title: Discord/网关 shutdown: treat expected reconnect-exhausted events 期间 intentional lifecycle 停止 as clean shutdowns so startup-abort cleanup no longer surfaces false 网关 failures. (#55324) Thanks @joelnishanth.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/gateway shutdown: treat expected reconnect-exhausted events during intentional lifecycle stop as clean shutdowns so startup-abort cleanup no longer surfaces false gateway failures. (#55324) Thanks @joelnishanth.

changes.title: Discord/网关 shutdown: suppress reconnect-exhausted events that were already buffered 之前 teardown flips `lifecycleStopping`, so stale-socket Discord restarts no longer 崩溃 the whole 网关. 修复 #55403 和 #55421. Thanks @lml2468 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/gateway shutdown: suppress reconnect-exhausted events that were already buffered before teardown flips `lifecycleStopping`, so stale-socket Discord restarts no longer crash the whole gateway. Fixes #55403 and #55421. Thanks @lml2468 and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: GitHub Copilot/认证 refresh: treat large `expires_at` values as seconds epochs 和 clamp far-future runtime 认证 refresh timers so Copilot 令牌 refresh cannot fall 进入 a `setTimeout` overflow hot loop. (#55360) Thanks @michael-abdo.
changes.rawTitle: GitHub Copilot/auth refresh: treat large `expires_at` values as seconds epochs and clamp far-future runtime auth refresh timers so Copilot token refresh cannot fall into a `setTimeout` overflow hot loop. (#55360) Thanks @michael-abdo.

changes.rawTitle: Agents/status: use the persisted runtime session model in `session_status` when no explicit override exists, and honor per-agent `thinkingDefault` in both `session_status` and `/status`. (#55425) Thanks @scoootscooob, @xaeon2026, and @ysfbsf.

changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp/mentions: stop treating mentions embedded in quoted messages as direct mentions so replying to a message that @mentioned the bot no longer falsely triggers mention gating. (#52711) Thanks @lurebat.

changes.rawTitle: Matrix: keep separate 2-person rooms out of DM routing after `m.direct` seeds successfully, while still honoring explicit `is_direct` state and startup fallback recovery. (#54890) thanks @private-peter

changes.rawTitle: Agents/model switching: apply `/model` changes to active embedded runs at the next safe retry boundary, so overloaded or retrying turns switch to the newly selected model instead of staying pinned to the old provider.

items.title: Control 界面/Skills: open skill detail dialogs 使用 the 浏览器 modal lifecycle so clicking a skill row keeps the panel centered 而不是 rendering it off-screen at the bottom 的 the page.
items.rawTitle: Control UI/Skills: open skill detail dialogs with the browser modal lifecycle so clicking a skill row keeps the panel centered instead of rendering it off-screen at the bottom of the page.

items.title: Talk/macOS: 停止 direct system-语音 failures 从 replaying system speech, use app-locale fallback 为了 shared watchdog timing, 和 添加 regression coverage 为了 the macOS fallback route 和 language-aware 超时 policy. (#53511) thanks @hongsw.
items.rawTitle: Talk/macOS: stop direct system-voice failures from replaying system speech, use app-locale fallback for shared watchdog timing, and add regression coverage for the macOS fallback route and language-aware timeout policy. (#53511) thanks @hongsw.

items.title: Heartbeat/runner: guarantee the interval timer is re-armed 之后 heartbeat runs 和 unexpected runner errors so scheduled heartbeats do not 静默地 停止 之后 an interrupted cycle. (#52270) Thanks @MiloStack.
items.rawTitle: Heartbeat/runner: guarantee the interval timer is re-armed after heartbeat runs and unexpected runner errors so scheduled heartbeats do not silently stop after an interrupted cycle. (#52270) Thanks @MiloStack.

changes.title: Providers/Qwen: 移除 the deprecated `qwen-portal-认证` OAuth认证 integration 为了 `portal.qwen.ai`; migrate to 模型 Studio 使用 `openclaw onboard --认证-choice modelstudio-API-密钥`. (#52709) Thanks @pomelo-nwu.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/Qwen: remove the deprecated `qwen-portal-auth` OAuth integration for `portal.qwen.ai`; migrate to Model Studio with `openclaw onboard --auth-choice modelstudio-api-key`. (#52709) Thanks @pomelo-nwu.

changes.title: 配置/诊断工具: drop automatic 配置 migrations older than two months; very old legacy keys 现在 fail validation 而不是 being rewritten 在 load 或 通过 `openclaw 诊断工具`.
changes.rawTitle: Config/Doctor: drop automatic config migrations older than two months; very old legacy keys now fail validation instead of being rewritten on load or by `openclaw doctor`.

changes.title: xAI/tools: move the bundled xAI provider to the Responses API, 添加 first-class `x_search`, 和 auto-启用 the xAI 插件 从 owned web-search 和 工具 配置 so bundled Grok 认证/configured search flows work 不适用 manual 插件 toggles. (#56048) Thanks @huntharo.
changes.rawTitle: xAI/tools: move the bundled xAI provider to the Responses API, add first-class `x_search`, and auto-enable the xAI plugin from owned web-search and tool config so bundled Grok auth/configured search flows work without manual plugin toggles. (#56048) Thanks @huntharo.

changes.title: MiniMax: 添加 image generation provider 为了 `image-01` 模型, supporting generate 和 image-to-image editing 使用 aspect ratio control. (#54487) Thanks @liyuan97.
changes.rawTitle: MiniMax: add image generation provider for `image-01` model, supporting generate and image-to-image editing with aspect ratio control. (#54487) Thanks @liyuan97.

changes.title: 插件/hooks: 添加 async `requireApproval` to `before_tool_call` hooks, letting 插件 pause 工具 execution 和 prompt the user 为了 approval via the exec approval overlay, Telegram buttons, Discord interactions, 或 the `/approve` 命令 在 any channel. The `/approve` 命令 现在 handles both exec 和 插件 approvals 使用 automatic fallback. (#55339) Thanks @vaclavbelak 和 @joshavant.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/hooks: add async `requireApproval` to `before_tool_call` hooks, letting plugins pause tool execution and prompt the user for approval via the exec approval overlay, Telegram buttons, Discord interactions, or the `/approve` command on any channel. The `/approve` command now handles both exec and plugin approvals with automatic fallback. (#55339) Thanks @vaclavbelak and @joshavant.

changes.title: ACP/channels: 添加 current-conversation ACP binds 为了 Discord, BlueBubbles, 和 iMessage so `/acp spawn Codex --bind here` can turn the current chat 进入 a Codex-backed workspace 不适用 creating a child thread, 和 document the distinction 之间 chat surface, ACP session, 和 runtime workspace.
changes.rawTitle: ACP/channels: add current-conversation ACP binds for Discord, BlueBubbles, and iMessage so `/acp spawn codex --bind here` can turn the current chat into a Codex-backed workspace without creating a child thread, and document the distinction between chat surface, ACP session, and runtime workspace.

changes.title: OpenAI/apply_patch: 启用 `apply_patch` 通过 default 为了 OpenAI 和 OpenAI Codex 模型, 和 align its sandbox policy access 使用 `write` permissions.
changes.rawTitle: OpenAI/apply_patch: enable `apply_patch` by default for OpenAI and OpenAI Codex models, and align its sandbox policy access with `write` permissions.

changes.title: 插件/CLI backends: move bundled Claude CLI, Codex CLI, 和 Gemini CLI inference defaults onto the 插件 surface, 添加 bundled Gemini CLI backend 支持, 和 replace `网关 run --claude-CLI-logs` 使用 generic `--CLI-backend-logs` while keeping the old flag as a compatibility alias.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/CLI backends: move bundled Claude CLI, Codex CLI, and Gemini CLI inference defaults onto the plugin surface, add bundled Gemini CLI backend support, and replace `gateway run --claude-cli-logs` with generic `--cli-backend-logs` while keeping the old flag as a compatibility alias.

changes.title: 插件/startup: auto-load bundled provider 和 CLI-backend 插件 从 explicit 配置 refs, so bundled Claude CLI, Codex CLI, 和 Gemini CLI message-provider setups no longer need manual `插件.允许` entries.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/startup: auto-load bundled provider and CLI-backend plugins from explicit config refs, so bundled Claude CLI, Codex CLI, and Gemini CLI message-provider setups no longer need manual `plugins.allow` entries.

changes.title: Podman: simplify the container setup around the current rootless user, install the launch helper under `~/.local/bin`, 和 document the host-CLI `openclaw --container <name> ...` workflow 而不是 a dedicated `openclaw` service user.
changes.rawTitle: Podman: simplify the container setup around the current rootless user, install the launch helper under `~/.local/bin`, and document the host-CLI `openclaw --container <name> ...` workflow instead of a dedicated `openclaw` service user.

changes.title: Slack/工具 actions: 添加 an explicit `upload-file` Slack action that routes file uploads through the existing Slack upload transport, 使用 optional filename/title/comment overrides 为了 channels 和 DMs.
changes.rawTitle: Slack/tool actions: add an explicit `upload-file` Slack action that routes file uploads through the existing Slack upload transport, with optional filename/title/comment overrides for channels and DMs.

changes.title: Message actions/files: start unifying file-first sends 在 the canonical `upload-file` action 通过 adding explicit 支持 为了 Microsoft Teams 和 Google Chat, 和 通过 exposing BlueBubbles file sends through `upload-file` while keeping the legacy `sendAttachment` alias.
changes.rawTitle: Message actions/files: start unifying file-first sends on the canonical `upload-file` action by adding explicit support for Microsoft Teams and Google Chat, and by exposing BlueBubbles file sends through `upload-file` while keeping the legacy `sendAttachment` alias.

changes.title: 插件/Matrix TTS: send auto-TTS replies as native Matrix 语音 bubbles 而不是 generic audio attachments. (#37080) thanks @Matthew19990919.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/Matrix TTS: send auto-TTS replies as native Matrix voice bubbles instead of generic audio attachments. (#37080) thanks @Matthew19990919.

changes.title: CLI: 添加 `openclaw 配置 schema` to print the generated JSON schema 为了 `openclaw.json`. (#54523) Thanks @kvokka.
changes.rawTitle: CLI: add `openclaw config schema` to print the generated JSON schema for `openclaw.json`. (#54523) Thanks @kvokka.

changes.title: 配置/TTS: auto-migrate legacy speech 配置 在 normal reads 和 secret resolution, keep legacy diagnostics 为了 诊断工具, 和 移除 regular-mode runtime fallback 为了 old bundled `tts.<provider>` API-密钥 shapes.
changes.rawTitle: Config/TTS: auto-migrate legacy speech config on normal reads and secret resolution, keep legacy diagnostics for Doctor, and remove regular-mode runtime fallback for old bundled `tts.<provider>` API-key shapes.

changes.title: 内存/插件: move the pre-compaction 内存 flush plan behind the active 内存 插件 contract so `内存-core` owns flush prompts 和 target-路径 policy 而不是 hardcoded core logic.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/plugins: move the pre-compaction memory flush plan behind the active memory plugin contract so `memory-core` owns flush prompts and target-path policy instead of hardcoded core logic.

changes.title: MiniMax: trim 模型 catalog to M2.7 only, removing legacy M2, M2.1, M2.5, 和 VL-01 模型. (#54487) Thanks @liyuan97.
changes.rawTitle: MiniMax: trim model catalog to M2.7 only, removing legacy M2, M2.1, M2.5, and VL-01 models. (#54487) Thanks @liyuan97.

changes.title: 插件/runtime: expose `runHeartbeatOnce` 在 the 插件 runtime `system` namespace so 插件 can trigger a single heartbeat cycle 使用 an explicit delivery target override (e.g. `heartbeat: { target: "last" }`). (#40299) Thanks @loveyana.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/runtime: expose `runHeartbeatOnce` in the plugin runtime `system` namespace so plugins can trigger a single heartbeat cycle with an explicit delivery target override (e.g. `heartbeat: { target: "last" }`). (#40299) Thanks @loveyana.

changes.title: Agent/compaction: 保留 the post-compaction Agent refresh 在 stale-usage preflight compaction 为了 both immediate replies 和 queued followups. (#49479) Thanks @jared596.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/compaction: preserve the post-compaction AGENTS refresh on stale-usage preflight compaction for both immediate replies and queued followups. (#49479) Thanks @jared596.

changes.rawTitle: Agents/compaction: surface safeguard-specific cancel reasons and relabel benign manual `/compact` no-op cases as skipped instead of failed. (#51072) Thanks @afurm.

changes.title: Docs: 添加 `pnpm docs:check-links:anchors` 为了 Mintlify anchor validation while keeping `scripts/docs-link-audit.mjs` as the stable link-audit entrypoint. (#55912) Thanks @velvet-shark.
changes.rawTitle: Docs: add `pnpm docs:check-links:anchors` for Mintlify anchor validation while keeping `scripts/docs-link-audit.mjs` as the stable link-audit entrypoint. (#55912) Thanks @velvet-shark.

changes.rawTitle: Google/models: resolve Gemini 3.1 pro, flash, and flash-lite for all Google provider aliases by passing the actual runtime provider ID and adding a template-provider fallback; fix flash-lite prefix ordering. (#56567)

changes.title: OpenAI Codex/image tools: register Codex 为了 media understanding 和 route image prompts through Codex instructions so image analysis no longer fails 在 missing provider registration 或 missing `instructions`. (#54829) Thanks @neeravmakwana.
changes.rawTitle: OpenAI Codex/image tools: register Codex for media understanding and route image prompts through Codex instructions so image analysis no longer fails on missing provider registration or missing `instructions`. (#54829) Thanks @neeravmakwana.

changes.title: Agent/image 工具: restore the generic image-runtime fallback 当 no provider-specific media-understanding provider is registered, so image analysis works 重新 为了 providers like `OpenRouter` 和 `MiniMax-portal`. (#54858) Thanks @MonkeyLeeT.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/image tool: restore the generic image-runtime fallback when no provider-specific media-understanding provider is registered, so image analysis works again for providers like `openrouter` and `minimax-portal`. (#54858) Thanks @MonkeyLeeT.

changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp: fix infinite echo loop in self-chat DM mode where the bot's own outbound replies were re-processed as new inbound user messages. (#54570) Thanks @joelnishanth

changes.rawTitle: Telegram/splitting: replace proportional text estimate with verified HTML-length search so long messages split at word boundaries instead of mid-word; gracefully degrade when tag overhead exceeds the limit. (#56595)

changes.rawTitle: Telegram/delivery: skip whitespace-only and hook-blanked text replies in bot delivery to prevent GrammyError 400 empty-text crashes. (#56620)

changes.rawTitle: Telegram/send: validate `replyToMessageId` at all four API sinks with a shared normalizer that rejects non-numeric, NaN, and mixed-content strings. (#56587)

changes.rawTitle: Mistral: normalize OpenAI-compatible request flags so official Mistral API runs no longer fail with remaining `422 status code (no body)` chat errors.

changes.title: Control 界面/配置: keep sensitive raw 配置 hidden 通过 default, replace the blank blocked editor 使用 an explicit reveal-to-edit state, 和 restore raw JSON editing 不适用 auto-exposing secrets. 修复 #55322.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/config: keep sensitive raw config hidden by default, replace the blank blocked editor with an explicit reveal-to-edit state, and restore raw JSON editing without auto-exposing secrets. Fixes #55322.

changes.rawTitle: CLI/zsh: defer `compdef` registration until `compinit` is available so zsh completion loads cleanly with plugin managers and manual setups. (#56555)

changes.rawTitle: BlueBubbles/debounce: guard debounce flush against null message text by sanitizing at the enqueue boundary and adding an independent combiner guard. (#56573)

changes.title: Auto-reply: suppress JSON-wrapped `{"action":"NO_REPLY"}` control envelopes 之前 channel delivery 使用 a strict single-密钥 detector; preserves media 当 text is only a silent envelope. (#56612)
changes.rawTitle: Auto-reply: suppress JSON-wrapped `{"action":"NO_REPLY"}` control envelopes before channel delivery with a strict single-key detector; preserves media when text is only a silent envelope. (#56612)

changes.title: ACP/ACPX Agent registry: align OpenClaw's ACPX built-在 Agent mirror 使用 the latest `openclaw/acpx` 命令 defaults 和 built-在 aliases, pin versioned `npx` built-ins to exact versions, 和 停止 unknown ACP Agent ids 从 falling through to raw `--Agent` 命令 execution 在 the MCP协议-代理 路径. (#28321) Thanks @m0nkmaster 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: ACP/ACPX agent registry: align OpenClaw's ACPX built-in agent mirror with the latest `openclaw/acpx` command defaults and built-in aliases, pin versioned `npx` built-ins to exact versions, and stop unknown ACP agent ids from falling through to raw `--agent` command execution on the MCP-proxy path. (#28321) Thanks @m0nkmaster and @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Security/audit: extend web search key audit to recognize Gemini, Grok/xAI, Kimi, Moonshot, and OpenRouter credentials via a boundary-safe bundled-web-search registry shim. (#56540)

changes.rawTitle: Telegram: deliver verbose tool summaries inside forum topic sessions again, so threaded topic chats now match DM verbose behavior. (#43236) Thanks @frankbuild.

changes.rawTitle: BlueBubbles/CLI agents: restore inbound prompt image refs for CLI routed turns, reapply embedded runner image size guardrails, and cover both CLI image transport paths with regression tests. (#51373)

changes.rawTitle: BlueBubbles/groups: optionally enrich unnamed participant lists with local macOS Contacts names after group gating passes, so group member context can show names instead of only raw phone numbers.

changes.title: Discord/reconnect: drain stale 网关 sockets, clear cached resume state 之前 forced fresh reconnects, 和 fail closed 当 old sockets refuse to die so Discord recovery stops looping 在 poisoned resume state. (#54697) Thanks @ngutman.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/reconnect: drain stale gateway sockets, clear cached resume state before forced fresh reconnects, and fail closed when old sockets refuse to die so Discord recovery stops looping on poisoned resume state. (#54697) Thanks @ngutman.

changes.rawTitle: iMessage: stop leaking inline `[[reply_to:...]]` tags into delivered text by sending `reply_to` as RPC metadata and stripping stray directive tags from outbound messages. (#39512) Thanks @mvanhorn.

changes.rawTitle: CLI/plugins: make routed commands use the same auto-enabled bundled-channel snapshot as gateway startup, so configured bundled channels like Slack load without requiring a prior config rewrite. (#54809) Thanks @neeravmakwana.

changes.title: 配置/web fetch: 允许 the documented `tools.web.fetch.maxResponseBytes` 设置 在 runtime schema validation so valid configs no longer fail 使用 unrecognized-密钥 errors. (#53401) Thanks @erhhung.
changes.rawTitle: Config/web fetch: allow the documented `tools.web.fetch.maxResponseBytes` setting in runtime schema validation so valid configs no longer fail with unrecognized-key errors. (#53401) Thanks @erhhung.

changes.title: Message 工具/buttons: keep the shared `buttons` schema optional 在 merged 工具 definitions so plain `action=send` calls 停止 failing validation 当 no buttons are provided. (#54418) Thanks @adzendo.

changes.title: Agent/OpenAI-compatible 工具 calls: deduplicate repeated 工具 call ids across live assistant messages 和 replayed history so OpenAI-compatible backends no longer reject duplicate `tool_call_id` values 使用 HTTP 400. (#40996) Thanks @xaeon2026.

changes.title: 模型/OpenAI-completions: default non-native OpenAI-compatible providers to omit 工具-definition `strict` fields unless users explicitly opt back 在, so 工具 calling keeps working 在 providers that reject that 选项. (#45497) Thanks @sahancava.
changes.rawTitle: Models/openai-completions: default non-native OpenAI-compatible providers to omit tool-definition `strict` fields unless users explicitly opt back in, so tool calling keeps working on providers that reject that option. (#45497) Thanks @sahancava.

changes.title: 插件/context engines: 重试 strict legacy `assemble()` calls 不适用 the new `prompt` field 当 older engines reject it, preserving prompt-aware retrieval compatibility 为了 pre-prompt 插件. (#50848) thanks @danhdoan.

changes.title: CLI/更新 status: explicitly say `up to date` 当 the local version already matches npm latest, while keeping the availability logic unchanged. (#51409) Thanks @dongzhenye.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/update status: explicitly say `up to date` when the local version already matches npm latest, while keeping the availability logic unchanged. (#51409) Thanks @dongzhenye.

changes.title: Daemon/Linux: 停止 flagging non-网关 systemd services as duplicate gateways just because their unit files mention OpenClaw, reducing false-positive 诊断工具/log noise. (#45328) Thanks @gregretkowski.
changes.rawTitle: Daemon/Linux: stop flagging non-gateway systemd services as duplicate gateways just because their unit files mention OpenClaw, reducing false-positive doctor/log noise. (#45328) Thanks @gregretkowski.

changes.rawTitle: Feishu: close WebSocket connections on monitor stop/abort so ghost connections no longer persist, preventing duplicate event processing and resource leaks across restart cycles. (#52844) Thanks @schumilin.

changes.title: 飞书: use the original message `create_time` 而不是 `Date.现在()` 为了 inbound timestamps so offline-retried messages carry the correct authoring time, preventing mis-targeted Agent actions 在 stale instructions. (#52809) Thanks @schumilin.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu: use the original message `create_time` instead of `Date.now()` for inbound timestamps so offline-retried messages carry the correct authoring time, preventing mis-targeted agent actions on stale instructions. (#52809) Thanks @schumilin.

changes.rawTitle: Control UI/Skills: open skill detail dialogs with the browser modal lifecycle so clicking a skill row keeps the panel centered instead of rendering it off-screen at the bottom of the page.

changes.rawTitle: Matrix/replies: include quoted poll question/options in inbound reply context so the agent sees the original poll content when users reply to Matrix poll messages. (#55056) Thanks @alberthild.

changes.title: Agent/sandbox: make blocked-工具 guidance glob-aware 重新, redact/sanitize session-specific explain hints 为了 safer copy-paste, 和 避免 leaking control-character session keys 在 those hints. (#54684) Thanks @ngutman.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/sandbox: make blocked-tool guidance glob-aware again, redact/sanitize session-specific explain hints for safer copy-paste, and avoid leaking control-character session keys in those hints. (#54684) Thanks @ngutman.

changes.title: Agent/compaction: trigger 超时 recovery compaction 之前 retrying high-context LLM timeouts so embedded runs 停止 repeating oversized requests. (#46417) thanks @joeykrug.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/compaction: trigger timeout recovery compaction before retrying high-context LLM timeouts so embedded runs stop repeating oversized requests. (#46417) thanks @joeykrug.

changes.rawTitle: Agents/compaction: reconcile `sessions.json.compactionCount` after a late embedded auto-compaction success so persisted session counts catch up once the handler reports completion. (#45493) Thanks @jackal092927.

changes.rawTitle: Agents/failover: classify Codex accountId token extraction failures as auth errors so model fallback continues to the next configured candidate. (#55206) Thanks @cosmicnet.

changes.title: 插件/runtime: 复用 only compatible active 插件 registries across tools, providers, web search, 和 channel bootstrap, align `/tools/invoke` 插件 loading 使用 the session workspace, 和 重试 outbound channel recovery 当 the pinned channel surface changes so 插件 tools 和 channels 停止 disappearing 或 re-registering 从 mismatched runtime loads. Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/runtime: reuse only compatible active plugin registries across tools, providers, web search, and channel bootstrap, align `/tools/invoke` plugin loading with the session workspace, and retry outbound channel recovery when the pinned channel surface changes so plugin tools and channels stop disappearing or re-registering from mismatched runtime loads. Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: Talk/macOS: 停止 direct system-语音 failures 从 replaying system speech, use app-locale fallback 为了 shared watchdog timing, 和 添加 regression coverage 为了 the macOS fallback route 和 language-aware 超时 policy. (#53511) thanks @hongsw.
changes.rawTitle: Talk/macOS: stop direct system-voice failures from replaying system speech, use app-locale fallback for shared watchdog timing, and add regression coverage for the macOS fallback route and language-aware timeout policy. (#53511) thanks @hongsw.

changes.title: Discord/网关 cleanup: keep late Carbon reconnect-exhausted errors suppressed through startup/dispose cleanup so Discord monitor shutdown no longer crashes 在 late 网关 close events. (#55373) Thanks @Takhoffman.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/gateway cleanup: keep late Carbon reconnect-exhausted errors suppressed through startup/dispose cleanup so Discord monitor shutdown no longer crashes on late gateway close events. (#55373) Thanks @Takhoffman.

changes.title: Discord/网关 shutdown: treat expected reconnect-exhausted events 期间 intentional lifecycle 停止 as clean shutdowns so startup-abort cleanup no longer surfaces false 网关 failures. (#55324) Thanks @joelnishanth.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/gateway shutdown: treat expected reconnect-exhausted events during intentional lifecycle stop as clean shutdowns so startup-abort cleanup no longer surfaces false gateway failures. (#55324) Thanks @joelnishanth.

changes.title: Discord/网关 shutdown: suppress reconnect-exhausted events that were already buffered 之前 teardown flips `lifecycleStopping`, so stale-socket Discord restarts no longer 崩溃 the whole 网关. 修复 #55403 和 #55421. Thanks @lml2468 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/gateway shutdown: suppress reconnect-exhausted events that were already buffered before teardown flips `lifecycleStopping`, so stale-socket Discord restarts no longer crash the whole gateway. Fixes #55403 and #55421. Thanks @lml2468 and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: GitHub Copilot/认证 refresh: treat large `expires_at` values as seconds epochs 和 clamp far-future runtime 认证 refresh timers so Copilot 令牌 refresh cannot fall 进入 a `setTimeout` overflow hot loop. (#55360) Thanks @michael-abdo.
changes.rawTitle: GitHub Copilot/auth refresh: treat large `expires_at` values as seconds epochs and clamp far-future runtime auth refresh timers so Copilot token refresh cannot fall into a `setTimeout` overflow hot loop. (#55360) Thanks @michael-abdo.

changes.rawTitle: Agents/status: use the persisted runtime session model in `session_status` when no explicit override exists, and honor per-agent `thinkingDefault` in both `session_status` and `/status`. (#55425) Thanks @scoootscooob, @xaeon2026, and @ysfbsf.

changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp/mentions: stop treating mentions embedded in quoted messages as direct mentions so replying to a message that @mentioned the bot no longer falsely triggers mention gating. (#52711) Thanks @lurebat.

changes.title: Control 界面/Agent: convert Agent workspace file rows to expandable `<details>` 使用 lazy-loaded inline markdown preview, 和 添加 comprehensive `.sidebar-markdown` styles 为了 headings, lists, code blocks, tables, blockquotes, 和 details/summary elements. (#53411) Thanks @BunsDev.
